title: euphrasia ericetorum subsp. stricta
intro: Euphrasia ericetorum subsp. stricta, also known as strict alpine eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia ericetorum subsp. stricta include its ability to soothe and calm eye irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat eye problems and respiratory infections.
